audit_items.proof_trace: Line 785 clamps elapsedTime to auctionDuration before the multiplier is computed. Config-time validation in _applyAssetParamsUpdates (L647-657) enforces auctionDuration > 0 and startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier. The linear decay formula subtracts at most (startingPriceMultiplier − endingPriceMultiplier) * 1 (when elapsedTime = auctionDuration), yielding exactly endingPriceMultiplier as the floor; for all smaller elapsedTime the floor is not reached, so priceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier holds on every path.
